statement.markdown:
## Problem Statement
Create a Promise Pool class that limits the number of concurrently running promises.
### Requirements

1. The class should have a constructor that takes the maximum number of concurrent promises as an argument.
2. The class should have a method that can queue up promises, which will be executed concurrently up to the maximum number specified.
3. The class should handle promises rejection and provide the rejected reasons.
4. The class should support chaining of promises.
